details.test: Task 1: Join high-impact climate campaign newsletter
Task 2: RSVP to nearest in-person voting rights event

Task 4: Create and publish student debt petition with 500-signature goal

Task 6: Bookmark top campaign under 5 hours/week and add to Priority Campaigns
Task 7: Build 4-step 30-day climate justice action plan

Task 9: Save three police reform articles under 10 minutes to reading list
